holdings.infoBox: GEND is an equity ETF with a total of 35 individual holdings. The top holdings are Northern Trust stock at 4.47%, Cisco Systems at 4.45%, CVS Health at 4.40%, Enbridge at 4.36%, and Altria Group at 4.13%.

overview.description: The Genter Capital Dividend Income ETF (GEND) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in high dividend yield equity. The fund is an actively managed fund that primarily invests in domestic, large cap securities with consistent dividend payments, selected and weighted based on a quantitative screening and fundamental analysis. GEND was launched on Dec 31, 2024 and is issued by Genter Capital.
